description: Fetch a Bitbucket Data Center repository issue by numeric id. Requires the repository issue tracker. Set include_comments to also GET /issues/{id}/comments (paged). Optional start/limit apply when include_comments is true.

issue_id.description: Issue id (numeric id from Bitbucket for this repository issue).

include_comments.description: When true, also fetch comments for this issue (paged JSON with values, start, limit, isLastPage).

start.description: Paging start offset for comments when include_comments is true.

limit.description: Page size for comments when include_comments is true.
